title: You can book me - monday changing booking time
excerpt: hey guys, i use zapier to create a new item when a booking is made on my YOU CAN BOOK ME calendar (its a software like calendly) , one of the columns on monday is the date and time of the booking. the problem is when the…

posts.author: raphael21 (raphael)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey guys, i use zapier to create a new item when a booking is made on my YOU CAN BOOK ME calendar (its a software like calendly) , one of the columns on monday is the date and time of the booking. the problem is when the item gets created in monday’ the time of the booking enters 8 hours later then the actual booking time. for exemaple if a client booked a meeting on my calender at 14:00 the booking time in the column on moday appers at 22:00

i have checked and my time zone on monday is correct and same as YOU CAN BOOK ME

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Welcome to the community Raphael!

Even though both pieces of software use the correct time zone, it sounds likely (to a software engineer like me) that one of the sides of the automation does still talk in the UTC time zone and so the date/time gets shifted. You’ll have to share a bit more about your situation:

  • What is your time zone?
  • Share some screenshots of your setup in your post to help people debug your situation

Reinier
Co-founder of automagical.work
